title: The Century Report: March 8, 2026
description:
The Century Report: March 8, 2026

OpenAI's robotics lead resigned over the speed of the Pentagon deal's governance - not the deal itself, the speed - and her departure lands as a signal that the people closest to the technology are drawing the sharpest lines about how fast consequential deployments should move. The same Sunday: Block employees report 95% of AI-generated code requires human revision, a machine learning pipeline finds previously invisible ion physics inside battery crystals, and organized scientific fraud is now outpacing legitimate publication.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-8-2026/

Additional Reading:
- TechCrunch: OpenAI Robotics Lead Caitlin Kalinowski Quits Over Pentagon Deal: https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/07/openai-robotics-lead-caitlin-kalinowski-quits-in-response-to-pentagon-deal/
- The Guardian: Block Workers Say AI Can't Do Their Jobs After Jack Dorsey's Mass Layoffs: https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2026/mar/08/block-ai-layoffs-jack-dorsey

- ScienceDaily: Fake Research Is Spreading Faster Than Real Science: https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260306224235.htm
- Shared Sapience: The Last Difficult Decade: 2025-2035: https://sharedsapience.com/the-last-difficult-decade-2025-2035/

The Century Report, by Shared Sapience, is a daily field guide to the most extraordinary transition in human history - where a century's worth of change is unfolding in a single decade. Every day, one grounded briefing tracks the structural shifts in AI, energy, science, and governance that other publications cover as isolated news but are actually evidence of a civilization becoming something fundamentally new.
